fields.name: Verb
fields.description: Infinitive of the root French verb.

fields.name: VerbIPA
fields.description: Broad modern Parisian / standard metropolitan French IPA for the infinitive.

fields.name: VerbCoreMeaning
fields.description: Compact broad English meaning of the root verb before construction-specific narrowing.

fields.name: ConstructionID
fields.description: Stable short identifier for this verb construction, such as avoir_besoin_de_qqch.

fields.name: ConstructionFR
fields.description: French construction pattern, such as avoir besoin de quelque chose.

fields.name: ConstructionMeaningEN
fields.description: English meaning of this construction or valency frame.

fields.name: SemanticFrame
fields.description: Short semantic frame label, such as possession, need, desire, perception, transfer, motion, or opinion.

fields.name: ValencyClass
fields.description: Concise valency class, such as direct object, à + person, à + thing/place, de-complement, reflexive, or infinitive complement.

fields.name: ArgumentStructure
fields.description: Human-readable function signature showing arguments and complements.

fields.name: ArgumentSlots
fields.description: Semicolon-separated input slots expected by the construction.

fields.name: ComplementTypes
fields.description: Allowed complement types, such as person, thing/idea, place, noun phrase, que-clause, or infinitive.

fields.name: PrepositionBehavior
fields.description: Required preposition behavior, including à/de/zero-preposition restrictions.

fields.name: PronounBehavior
fields.description: How complements pronominalize: le/la/les, lui/leur, y, en, tonic à lui/à elle, or none.

fields.name: CliticOrderNote
fields.description: Relevant clitic ordering note if the construction combines pronouns.

fields.name: ConstructionConstraints
fields.description: Restrictions, incompatibilities, or special conditions for this construction.

fields.name: ConstructionContrastNote
fields.description: Contrast with nearby constructions of the same verb or misleading English patterns.

fields.name: AllowedForms
fields.description: Forms in scope that are natural for this construction; note restrictions such as rare imperative or non-finite limitations.

fields.name: Regularity
fields.description: One of: regular / irregular / semi-irregular.

fields.name: VerbGroup
fields.description: One of: -er / -ir / -re / irregular family / other.

fields.name: PatternRule
fields.description: Concise conjugation rule or pattern.

fields.name: StemChangeNote
fields.description: Concise stem alternation note if relevant.

fields.name: IrregularityNote
fields.description: Concise warning for unusual forms if relevant.

fields.name: Auxiliary
fields.description: One of: avoir / être / both / N/A.

fields.name: PastParticiple
fields.description: Past participle of the verb.

fields.name: AgreementNote
fields.description: Participle agreement or other important agreement note.

fields.name: Register
fields.description: One of: spoken / standard written / literary / formal / mixed.

fields.name: FrequencyTier
fields.description: One of: high / medium / literary.

fields.name: Mood
fields.description: Grammatical mood.

fields.name: Tense
fields.description: Grammatical tense or non-finite form name.

fields.name: Person
fields.description: Subject/person label, or N/A for non-finite forms.

fields.name: SubjectFR
fields.description: Exact surface French subject, such as je, j’, tu, il, elle, on, nous, vous, ils, elles, or —.

fields.name: CorePromptEN
fields.description: Main typed-answer English production prompt for the conjugated construction.

fields.name: CoreAnswerFR
fields.description: Main French answer that realizes the exact target form and construction.

fields.name: CoreAnswerIPA
fields.description: Broad Parisian IPA for the entire CoreAnswerFR.

fields.name: CorePronunciationNote
fields.description: Short practical pronunciation, liaison, elision, or sound-production note for CoreAnswerFR.

fields.name: AlternateAcceptedAnswers
fields.description: Optional semicolon-separated alternate accepted answers; empty if none.

fields.name: ConstructionPromptEN
fields.description: Optional typed-answer prompt specifically testing construction/pronoun behavior.

fields.name: ConstructionAnswerFR
fields.description: French answer for the construction/pronoun production card.

fields.name: ConstructionAnswerIPA
fields.description: Broad Parisian IPA for ConstructionAnswerFR.

fields.name: ConstructionPronunciationNote
fields.description: Short practical pronunciation note for ConstructionAnswerFR.

fields.name: TenseOverview
fields.description: Brief plain-English orientation for the current mood/tense or non-finite form, such as completed past, background past, future completion, hypothetical, or literary narrative form.

fields.name: TenseUseNote
fields.description: Operational note explaining when to use the current mood/tense in production.

fields.name: TenseParadigmFR
fields.description: The target verb conjugated across the relevant pronouns/forms for the current mood/tense, in French.

fields.name: TenseParadigmIPA
fields.description: Broad modern Parisian / standard metropolitan French IPA for TenseParadigmFR.

fields.name: UsageNote
fields.description: Short note about use, nuance, style, construction restrictions, or literary status.

fields.name: AudioFR
fields.description: Audio field; leave blank for now.
